Overview

Cryptway is simple cryptocurrency transaction platform build with next js , hardhat , solidity , tailwindcss. This is web 3.0 project with allows transaction between 2 wallet through frontend, it has simple ui we use free ropsten test etherium for testing purposes, and also used Alchemy as dashboard and metamask as wallet we have deployed this project on vercel.

Overview

The Budget Allocation app made with React JS is a user-friendly and visually appealing web application that helps individuals to manage their finances effectively. The app allows users to track their income, expenses, and savings in real-time and provides them with detailed reports on their spending habits.

Using the app, users can set budgets for different categories such as groceries, transportation, entertainment, etc., and monitor their spending against these budgets. The app also provides helpful tips and suggestions to help users save money and achieve their financial goals.

The user interface of the app is intuitive and easy to navigate, with clear visualizations of the user's financial data. The app is built with React JS, a popular JavaScript library for building user interfaces, which ensures fast performance and smooth user experience.

Overall, the Budget Allocation app is an excellent tool for individuals who want to take control of their finances and make smarter financial decisions. Its simple yet powerful features make it a must-have for anyone looking to manage their money effectively.

Overview

The ecomm-django app made with Django is a powerful and scalable web application that enables businesses to create and manage their online stores easily. The app provides a comprehensive set of features, including product management, order management, payment processing, shipping, and more, all in one convenient package.

Using the app, businesses can easily create and manage their online store with minimal technical knowledge. The app features an intuitive user interface that makes it easy for users to add new products, update inventory, manage orders, and track shipments.

The app is built with Django, a high-level Python web framework that provides developers with a clean and robust toolkit for building web applications. Django's built-in security features, such as user authentication and permission handling, ensure that the app is secure and protected from common web vulnerabilities.

Overall, the ecomm-django app is an excellent tool for businesses looking to create and manage their online stores. Its powerful features and intuitive user interface make it easy to use and manage, while its robust security features provide peace of mind for businesses and their customers.

Overview

Modern-blog app features recent posts, categories. full markdown articles, author information, comments, and much more, this app is made with NextJs, Tailwind css, GraphQl and GraphCMS while developing this app I learned how to work with GraphCMS. (GraphCMS is a headless content management system based on GraphQL technology enabling seamless integration with any application.) Designed this app eith tailwind css,and deployed it on vercel. In this app I also have also wrote some post related to cyber security for testing purposes

Overview

The Pong game made with Unity is a classic arcade-style game that provides a fun and engaging gaming experience. The game is based on the original Pong game, where players control a paddle to hit a ball back and forth between two paddles.

In the game, players control their paddle using the arrow keys on their keyboard or by touching the screen on a mobile device. The objective is to hit the ball back and forth between the paddles and avoid missing the ball, which results in losing a point.

The game features vibrant graphics and sound effects, which add to the immersive gaming experience. The Unity game engine provides smooth and responsive gameplay, making the game enjoyable to play.

Overall, the Pong game made with Unity is an excellent example of a simple, yet engaging game that provides entertainment to players of all ages. Its intuitive controls and fun gameplay make it an excellent addition to any game developer's portfolio.
